creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
clsung      2011-09-28 01:36:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc/nltk        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  - update to 2.0.1rc1
  - use DISTVERSION instead PORTVERION to avoid bumping of PORTEPOCH in future updates
  - bump PORTEPOCH
  - ${MASTER_SITES_GOOGLE_CODE} -> GOOGLE_CODE
  - define RUN_DEPENDS exactly (portlint warning)
  - fix egginfo after switching to DISTVERSION
  - whitespace fixes in pkg-descr
  
  PR:             ports/157964
  Submitted by:   Ruslan Mahmatkhanov <cvs-src_AT_yandex dot ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.21      +6 -5      ports/textproc/nltk/Makefile
  1.14      +2 -2      ports/textproc/nltk/distinfo
  1.3       +10 -10    ports/textproc/nltk/pkg-descr
